title: Immensly Immersive
description: A Modpack with various immersive mods in mind! Create, Famers Delight, and Amethyst Imbuement to change up vanilla gameplay progress, and to give you options!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2770fc5f568d38800aab63eb83078b286a1e9217.jpeg)

# Its Immensly Immersive! # 

An expansive modpack designed with immersive gameplay in mind! Mods like Create, Farmer's Delight, and Amethyst Imbuement will reshape the vanilla experience with fresh progression mechanics. Fabric Seasons introduces dynamically changing seasons, while Immersive Weathering brings the world to life, as landscapes naturally evolve and grow more weathered over time. With Farmer's Delight, you'll need to consider seasonal crops, and Create allows you to automate tasks, letting you relax and take in the scenery as your machines handle the hard work. This modpack aims to offer something for everyone, enhancing gameplay without straying too far from the core vanilla Minecraft experience.

Originally conceived as a Fabric alternative to All The Mods, this modpack has grown into a carefully curated selection. Rather than simply bundling together random mods, each mod is chosen to complement the others, creating a cohesive and engaging gameplay experience.
This is a client-side modpack, A server side variation coming. The link for that will be put here in the future.
